name: Skeleton
purpose: Loading placeholder that mirrors final layout while data is fetched from sources.

structures.name: Text Lines
structures.notes: Variable-width lines approximate paragraph or label content.

structures.name: Card Skeleton
structures.notes: Mirrors app-card and list-item layouts to reduce layout shift.

structures.name: Table Skeleton
structures.notes: Repeats row blocks matching column rhythm of the data table.

interactionNotes: Use a low-contrast muted fill with a subtle shimmer; never block interaction longer than needed.
Match skeleton geometry to the real component so content does not jump on load.
